page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Point Reyes Light (Point Reyes Station, California), dated Thursday, August 5, 1993, page 10. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 15, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

By 1993, Dick's cultural profile continued to rise with new film adaptations and scholarly attention.
